name: KTLYST - Ontario Power Generation - Cloud Identity IOC Correlation

properties.displayName: KTLYST - Ontario Power Generation - Cloud Identity IOC Correlation
properties.description: Correlates medium/high-risk sign-ins for Ontario Power Generation with cloud app activity referencing known KTLYST phishing IOCs. Runs every 15 minutes over a 1-hour window.
properties.query:
let ioc_domains = dynamic(['www.ccontrols.com']);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('medium','high')
| join kind=inner (
    CloudAppEvents
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
    | where ObjectName has_any (ioc_domains)
      or AccountObjectId has_any (ioc_domains)
) on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.AccountUpn
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress,
          RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ActionType, ObjectName

metadata.note: Rule ships with enabled=false. Review in Sentinel > Analytics > Active Rules before enabling. Cloud team owns this rule; it is distinct from the SIEM detection bundle shipped by the SIEM team.
